chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No. 3212 of 2016 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1.For order on Misc No. 26038/2016 2.For hearing of Misc No. 16361/2016 3.For hearing of main case. 03.10.2016 Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi A.A.G ------------------------- 1. Learned counsel for the petitioner has moved urgency application in which it is stated that he wants to withdraw this petition. The application is supported by personal affidavit of Hussain Bux advocate who is appearing for the petitioner. A separate statement is also attached duly signed by advocate for the petitioner in which also the same request has been made. In view of this statement, petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
